name_en: A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
name_cn:
A2210 Large In Stock Chane🌱Vintage Backpack
It's no exaggeration to say this is a vintage backpack that can be passed down! Classic double C logo, quilted pattern
Paired with a gold metal leather chain strap, it feels substantial
Sheepskin is soft and delicate, making it impossible not to want to own and cherish it! Suitable for all seasons, any style💃
Must-have in your bag closet, available in black
Dimensions: 21*10*20.5cm.
1091063
